name: web_search
description: Search the web for current hospitality market data, hotel listings, industry reports, tourism statistics, comparable property information, cap rate surveys, and regulatory updates. Use this to supplement your training knowledge with real-time data when researching specific markets or properties.

query.description: Search query targeting hospitality market data (e.g., 'boutique hotel ADR Upstate New York 2025', 'hotel cap rates CBRE 2026', 'STR hotel occupancy trends')

num_results.description: Number of results to return (1-10, default 5)
